items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Five hundred against fifty thousand. Liu Bei, Guan Yu, and Zhang Fei did not step back.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: The Yellow Turban vanguard charged. Zhang Fei and Guan Yu broke it almost before the battle began.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: At Qingzhou, Liu Bei chose a trap. Guan Yu and Zhang Fei hid on the flanks while he drew the enemy in.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Three forces fell like three blades. The Yellow Turbans shattered.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: At Guangzong, Liu Bei finally stood before his old teacher.

items.speaker: narrator
items.text: Their blades were not yet cold. The fighting was not yet done.
